title: Interviewing Experts
description: Preparing deeply, asking the crux question, listening for what the expert almost said.
summary_pt_br: Entrevistar especialistas: leia 3 melhores textos, pergunta do núcleo, escute a frase que quase saiu.

scenes.subtitle_en: Preparing deeply, asking the crux question, listening for what the expert almost said.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Entrevistar especialistas: leia 3 melhores textos, pergunta do núcleo, escute a frase que quase saiu.

scenes.text_en: Preparing deeply, asking the crux question, listening for what the expert almost said. Focus: interviewing experts. The crux question is the one they rarely answer directly.
scenes.text_pt: Entrevistar especialistas: leia 3 melhores textos, pergunta do núcleo, escute a frase que quase saiu. Foco: interviewing experts. A pergunta-chave é a que raramente respondem.

scenes.title: Interviewing Experts
scenes.body_en: Method: READ their three best pieces first. ASK the crux question (what they rarely answer). LISTEN for the sentence that almost came out. Follow it. Hold silence.
scenes.body_pt: Entrevistar especialistas: leia 3 melhores textos, pergunta do núcleo, escute a frase que quase saiu.

examples.en: The crux question is the one they rarely answer directly.
examples.pt: A pergunta-chave é a que raramente respondem.

examples.en: Silence after an expert's answer often produces the real answer.
examples.pt: Silêncio depois da resposta traz a resposta real.

examples.en: Follow the sentence that almost came out of their mouth.
examples.pt: Siga a frase que quase saiu.

exercise.question: Complete: "The crux ___ is the one they rarely answer directly."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The crux question is the one they rarely answer directly."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A pergunta-chave é a que raramente respondem.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Silence after an expert's answer often produces the real answer.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Silence after an expert's answer often produces the real answer."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Silêncio depois da resposta traz a resposta real.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Interviewing Experts — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre interviewing experts. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Kumar, how do you prepare to interview an expert?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I read their three best pieces first.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The one they rarely answer directly.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What do you do after an answer?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The sentence that almost came out.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Expert interviewing is listening in reverse.

scenes.title: The expert interview
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four interviewing moves. Use at least three interview terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Before the interview, Kumar read every piece the expert had ever written — three times, with three different pens.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: The crux question is the one she rarely answers directly in print — I ask it second, not first.

paragraphs.speaker: Assistant
paragraphs.en: After each answer, you hold silence for three full seconds — and she keeps talking, unprompted, most of the time.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: I listen for the sentence that almost came out — and I follow that thread, however long it takes to unravel.

paragraphs.speaker: Assistant
paragraphs.en: You once said interviewing experts is listening in reverse — you hear what they didn't say, first.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Expert interviewing, Kumar believed, is the art of making someone who knows more than you speak past their own caution.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Interviewing Experts". Preparing deeply, asking the crux question, listening for what the expert almost said. The crux question is the one they rarely answer directly. Silence after an expert's answer often produces the real answer. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Interviewing Experts". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
